## Checklist

- [ ] I have linked an issue above (or explained why there is none)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (new tests added for new code)
- [ ] If this touches the iOS app, I have also updated the desktop app (and vice-versa)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values are committed
- [ ] If this changes UI, I have attached a screenshot or screen recording below
